source_pr.title: ddl/issyncer: support cross keyspace scenario
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: ref #61702

Problem Summary:

### What changed and how does it work?
- add a `assumed server` mechanism, which will be used in syncing cross keyspace info schema later. the `assumed server` is identified by `AssumedKeyspace` field in `ServerInfo`
  - online schema change will consider `assumed server` if the DDL is related to system tables, otherwise we will filter them out.
- some refactor and add some comments to schema checker/validator
- support `crossKS` in server info syncer
- support `crossKS` in I_S syncer to only cares about system tables, and skip MDL check for user tables.
- skip loading unrelated diff for `crossKS`, and loading `mysql` db through the reserved ID.
- skip loading virtual tables for cross keyspace I_S
### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No need to test
  > - [ ] I checked and no code files have been changed.
  > <!-- Or your custom  "No need to test" reasons -->

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

fix_pattern: add a `assumed server` mechanism, which will be used in syncing cross keyspace info schema later. the `assumed server` is identified by `AssumedKeyspace` field in `ServerInfo` online schema change will consider `assumed server` if the DDL is related to system tables, otherwise we will filter them out. some refactor and add some comments to schema checker/validator support `crossKS` in server info syncer support `crossKS` in I_S syncer to only cares about system tables, and skip MDL check for user tables. skip loading unrelated diff for `crossKS`, and loading `mysql` db through the reserved ID. skip loading virtual tables for cross keyspace I_S
